ResourceCover.CoverTips.Title: How Covers Work
ResourceCover.CoverTips.description: The system resolves covers using the following priority (first match wins):
ResourceCover.CoverTips.priority.externa: Downloaded from Steam, DLsite, ExHentai, etc.
ResourceCover.CoverTips.priority.cache.d: Auto-discovered from resource files (if cache is enabled)
ResourceCover.CoverTips.priority.discove: Real-time scan of resource files (cached after found)
ResourceCover.CoverTips.noCover: If no cover was found, you can:
ResourceCover.CoverTips.action.manualSet: Set cover manually in resource properties
ResourceCover.CoverTips.action.ffmpeg: Install FFmpeg for video thumbnail extraction
resource.action.refreshCache.tooltip: Clear and rebuild cache for this resource
Reset cover cache of current resource: Reset cover cache of current resource
resource.contextMenu.confirmDeleteCount: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} resource data?
resource.contextMenu.deleteDataOnlyWarni: This operation only deletes resource data. If your resource markers and corresponding files still exist, the resources may reappear during the next resource marker sync.
The following properties are not bound t: The following properties are not bound to resource profiles
There is no property bound yet, you can: There is no property bound yet, you can bind properties in resource profile.
The numbers represent the priority of pr: The numbers represent the priority of property dimensions, and the property values will be displayed according to the priority of the dimensions.
indicates this scope is not enabled: indicates this scope is not enabled
Setup priority of property value scopes: Setup priority of property value scopes
This filter is used for quick check and: This filter is used for quick check and does not change the priority of property value scopes.
You can click on the scope button to cha: You can click on the scope button to change the priority of the property value scopes.
resource.action.aiTranslate.tooltip: Translate all text properties to your language using AI
resource.conflict.title: Conflict Resolution
resource.conflict.description: The following resources share some source links with the current resource but are not the same resource. You can merge their data into the current resource or delete them.
